entity_data.img_caption: The image showcases a plate of Grilled Fish & Shrimp Scampi, served on a white plate with the text "nessuno cucina come la mamma" (no one cooks like mom) written around the edge. The dish features linguine pasta mixed with grilled fish and shrimp, garnished with fresh herbs. The plate is placed on a wooden table, and there are two glasses of white wine on either side of the plate. The background includes part of another plate and a glass of wine, suggesting a dining setting. The text at the bottom of the image identifies the dish as "Grilled Fish & Shrimp Scampi" from Pecorino - Piso L2.

The dish is presented in a way that highlights the texture and color of the octopus, making it look appetizing. entity_data.ocr_text:
Spaghetti com Polpetas ao Sugo
Madero - Piso L2
entity_data.img_caption:
The image showcases a plate of spaghetti with meatballs, a classic Italian dish known as "Spaghetti com Polpetas ao Sugo." The dish is presented on a white plate, which contrasts nicely with the vibrant orange color of the spaghetti and the reddish-brown hue of the meatballs. The meatballs appear to be well-cooked and tender, with a slightly glossy surface indicating they have been cooked in a sauce.

The spaghetti is generously coated with a rich, tomato-based sauce that has a deep red color, suggesting it might be a marinara or a similar type of sauce. The noodles are thick and curly, typical of Italian spaghetti, and they are mixed thoroughly with the meatballs and sauce, creating a hearty and appetizing meal.

Scattered atop the spaghetti are a few fresh basil leaves, adding a touch of green and a hint of freshness to the dish. The basil leaves are small and delicate, contrasting beautifully with the larger meatballs and the bright colors of the spaghetti and sauce.

In the background, there is a small bowl containing grated cheese, likely Parmesan, which is commonly served alongside spaghetti to enhance the flavor. Additionally, there is a glass of water placed next to the plate, indicating that the meal is ready to be enjoyed.

The text overlay on the image reads "Spaghetti com Polpetas ao Sugo" and "Madero - Piso L2," suggesting that this dish is available at Madero, located on the second floor (Piso L2) of a specific establishment. This information provides context about where the dish can be found and adds a touch of authenticity to the presentation.

It's lunch time

nessuno cucina come la mammola
entity_data.img_caption:
The image features a dining scene with a focus on a plate of pasta. The plate is white with the text "nessuno cucina come la mamma" written in black, along with an illustration of a sheep. The pasta appears to be a seafood dish, possibly spaghetti carbonara or a similar type, garnished with herbs and pieces of what looks like squid or octopus. 

In the background, there is another plate with a different dish, which seems to be a bowl of pasta with meat and vegetables. A glass of white wine is also visible, adding to the ambiance of a meal. The setting suggests a cozy and inviting atmosphere, likely in a restaurant or a well-decorated dining area.

The text at the top of the image reads, "It's lunch time," followed by "A sua hora do almoço ainda mais deliciosa no Balneário Shopping." This translates to "It's lunch time, your lunch time is even more delicious at Balneário Shopping." The text indicates that the image is promoting a dining experience at a shopping center called Balneário Shopping, emphasizing the enjoyment of a meal during lunchtime.

The image showcases a beautifully arranged sushi platter, featuring a variety of sushi rolls and sashimi. The main plate in the foreground contains several types of sushi rolls, including:

1. **Rolls with Seaweed (Nori)**: These rolls have a seaweed exterior and appear to be filled with different ingredients.
2. **Sushi Rolls with Fish**: Some rolls contain fish, likely salmon or tuna, wrapped in nori.

In addition to the sushi rolls, there is a small portion of sashimi, which includes:

1. **Salmon Sashimi**: Thin slices of salmon arranged neatly on the plate.
2. **Tuna Sashimi**: Another type of sashimi, possibly made from tuna, also arranged in thin slices.

The plate is garnished with a sprig of parsley and a small piece of wasabi, adding a touch of color and freshness to the presentation. In the background, there is another plate containing more sushi rolls and sashimi, along with some pickled ginger and wasabi.

The setting appears to be a dining table with a glass of water and chopsticks placed nearby. The text overlay on the image reads "Combinado Salmão Unizushi - Piso L1," indicating that this is a combination of salmon sushi from Unizushi restaurant located on the 1st floor.

The image depicts a dining setup featuring a variety of Japanese cuisine items on a wooden table. The main focus is on a small, rectangular plate with a light blue base, containing a piece of unagi (grilled eel) wrapped in nori (seaweed). Next to it, there is a small bowl filled with what appears to be pickled ginger and wasabi. 

In the center of the table, there is a small bowl containing a colorful assortment of seafood tempura, including shrimp and possibly other vegetables, garnished with a slice of lime. To the left of the tempura bowl, there is a small dish with a light-colored, possibly rice-based food item.

A glass of a light-colored beverage, likely a lemonade or iced tea, is placed next to the main plate. The drink has a straw and is garnished with a slice of orange and a sprig of mint.

In the foreground, there is a white paper napkin with the text "UNIZUSHI" printed on it, along with some Japanese characters below it. The overall setting suggests a casual yet elegant dining experience, possibly at a sushi restaurant named Unizushi. The background shows a row of wooden chairs and tables, indicating that this is part of a larger dining area.

entity_data.publication_caption: Pausa deliciosa no meio do dia? A gente sabe onde. 🍴✨ De um sushi impecável a cortes suculentos e receitas com sabor de casa italiana — o seu almoço no Balneário Shopping tem tudo para ser o melhor momento do dia. Escolha seu mood e bom apetite. Nosso menu começa no L2. 😋

Visitei o Unizushi, que está participando do Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping e me apaixonei! 🍣  Menu completo (entrada, prato principal e sobremesa) por R$70,00. Ambiente aconchegante, atendimento ótimo… me senti em casa.  O festival vai até 30/04, e além do Unizushi  os outros restaurantes participantes são: Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. então corre pra aproveitar! 🎉

Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

🚨 A ESPERA ACABOU: O line-up do C6 Fest 2025 já tá no ar! 😱  O festival que reúne grandes nomes do rock, soul, jazz e da MPB vai rolar entre os dias 22 e 25 de março de 2025. E vale lembrar que a Mix é RÁDIO OFICIAL do C6 Fest 2025! 🤩 Então já segue o perfil @radiomixfm pra ficar por dentro de tudo o que vai acontecer no festival! 📷: @c6fest #c6 #c6fest #c6bank #radiomix #radiomixfm

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Uma experiência italiana cheia de sabor e diversão! 🍕✨  No Duladu, a cozinha italiana ganha um toque moderno e descontraído, perfeita para quem ama boa comida e momentos especiais.  Que tal conhecer e se deliciar? 💛 📍 Duladu – Piso L1

Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.
Dentre os show mais cotados pra acontecer no Brasil em 2025, qual você gostaria de assistir? #ladygaga #oasis #u2 #adele #show

Definitivamente esse é o "talvez" que a gente gosta! 🗣 Segundo a revista NME, os irmãos Gallagher têm planos de trazer a "Live 2025", turnê que marca o reencontro da banda Oasis, para o Brasil! 😱 Ainda de acordo com fontes, o anúncio oficial deve acontecer em uma semana e também passará por diferentes cidades da Ásia, Austrália e outras das Américas! #oasis #liamgallagher #noelgallagher #live2025 #radiomix #radiomixfm

Bon appétit, baby! 🌮😋 Já imaginou andar pelas do México e dar de cara com Katy Perry comendo uns tacos? Porque exatamente o que aconteceu com alguns KatyCats mexicanos nesta quarta-feira (13)! A cantora já iniciou a sua agenda promocional no país dos nossos hermanos, e vale lembrar: em setembro do ano que vem, a nossa voltará ao Brasil para se apresentar no palco do The Town 2025! E aí, qual comida brasileira a Katy precisa experimentar assim que ela voltar pra cá? 👀 📷/📹: Rhevolver e ELTONEJO no X #katyperry #radiomix #radiomixfm
